tasks.title: Prisma schema: UserPrivacySetting, user_profile, whatsapp_user
tasks.description:
Create ALL Prisma models for EPIC-002 in prisma/schema.prisma.

Models to create:
- UserPrivacySetting: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- user_profile: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- whatsapp_user: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities

Include:
- All model fields with correct Prisma types (@id, @default, @unique, @db.*)
- All relations between models (1:1, 1:N, N:M)
- @@map() table name annotations
- Run: npx prisma generate after schema changes
tasks.success_criteria: Prisma model defined with all attributes, correct types, and @id field; User can: ein Profilbild hochladen und verwalten; User can: einen konfigurierbaren Anzeigenamen für das Profil festlegen und ändern; User can: einen kurzen Info-/Status-Text im Profil hinterlegen und anzeigen lassen; Address: Definieren Sie Sichtbarkeitsstufen und Default-Privacy.; Address: Ergänzen Sie Dateitypen/Größen, Upload-Fehlerbehandlung und Richtlinien.

    }

tasks.title: Feature: users (20 endpoints: DELETE, GET, POST, PUT)
tasks.description:
Generate the COMPLETE NestJS module for 'users' with ALL layers:
- Controller (all 20 endpoints)
- Service (business logic)
- DTOs (request/response types)
- Guards (JWT auth where needed)
- Validators (input validation)
- Module registration

Endpoints:
  POST /api/v1/users/{userId}/profile-images — Upload profile image
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/profile-images/current — Get current profile image
  PUT /api/v1/users/{userId}/profile-images/current — Replace current profile image
  DELETE /api/v1/users/{userId}/profile-images/current — Delete current profile image
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/profile — Get user profile
  PUT /api/v1/users/{userId}/profile/display-name — Update display name
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/profile/info-text — Get profile info text
  PUT /api/v1/users/{userId}/profile/info-text — Update profile info text
  POST /api/v1/users/{userId}/qr-codes — Generate a new profile QR code
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/qr-codes/{qrCodeId} — Retrieve a profile QR code
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/presence-visibility — Get online status visibility setting
  PUT /api/v1/users/{userId}/presence-visibility — Update online status visibility setting
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/presence-visibility/allowed-users — List users allowed to see online status
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/presence-visibility/denied-users — List users denied to see online status
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/settings/read-receipts — Get read receipt settings
  PUT /api/v1/users/{userId}/settings/read-receipts — Update read receipt settings
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/settings/profile-picture-visibility — Get profile picture visibility setting
  PUT /api/v1/users/{userId}/settings/profile-picture-visibility — Update profile picture visibility setting
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/privacy/infoVisibility — Get info/status text visibility settings
  PUT /api/v1/users/{userId}/privacy/infoVisibility — Update info/status text visibility settings
tasks.success_criteria: NestJS controller with correct decorators, DTOs, and route paths; User can: einen kurzen Info-/Status-Text im Profil hinterlegen und anzeigen lassen; User can: die Sichtbarkeit von Info- und Status-Texten für definierte Nutzergruppen konfigurieren; User can: ein Profilbild hochladen und verwalten; Address: Ergänzen Sie Dateitypen/Größen, Upload-Fehlerbehandlung und Richtlinien.

diagrams.content:
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant System

    User->>System: Upload Profilbild
    System-->>User: Bestätigung des Uploads
    User->>System: Zeige Profilbild an
    System-->>User: Profilbild anzeigen
    User->>System: Ändere Profilbild
    System-->>User: Bestätigung der Änderung
    User->>System: Lösche Profilbild
    System-->>User: Bestätigung des Löschens

sequenceDiagram
    participant User as Benutzer
    participant System as System
    participant Settings as Einstellungen

    User->>Settings: Ändern der Sichtbarkeit des Online-Status
    Settings->>System: Konfiguration speichern
    System-->>User: Bestätigung der Änderungen
    User->>System: Anmelden
    System-->>User: Zeigt Online-Status
    User->>System: Abmelden
    System-->>User: Aktualisierung des Online-Status

flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B{Ist Info-Sichtbarkeit konfigurierbar?}
    B -- Ja --> C[Konfiguration der Sichtbarkeit]
    B -- Nein --> D[System anpassen]
    C --> E{Info/Status-Text sichtbar?}
    E -- Ja --> F[Info/Status-Text anzeigen]
    E -- Nein --> G[Info/Status-Text ausblenden]
    F --> H[Ende]
    G --> H
    D --> H

tasks.title: Verify EPIC-002: build + typecheck
tasks.description:
Run all verification steps for EPIC-002:
1. npx prisma generate
2. npx tsc --noEmit (must pass with 0 errors)
3. npm run build
4. cd frontend && npx vite build (if frontend exists)
Fix any errors found.

tasks.title: Validate and integrate EPIC-002
tasks.description: Run all EPIC-002 tests, validate build, and verify all 9 user stories are implemented.
